query: here's one thing that we've not yet surfaced, but need to.  This dependency on the background tick processes... this is not running as a daemon at this stage... so commonly background processes don't actually run

entries.title: Arc startup resource threading: background tick's run_single_tick also constructs services directly
Arc threading gap + hidden run_single_tick bypass: serving-path compute_confidence silently uses ::default() when Arc not threaded through ServiceLayer AND background direct construction sites
Daemon-Mode Integration Test Fixture Pattern: daemon_server + tmp_project
ExtractionRule must not perform side effects: ephemeral signals belong in compute functions inside spawn_blocking, not in ProposedEntry output
When threading a new Arc into spawn_background_tick, check for pre-existing moves of that Arc into UnimatrixServer::new between construction and the tick call
